title: High Impact Brand Action Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: High Impact Brand Action Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-impact brand campaign poster featuring fictional athletic shoe campaign with runner bursting through graphic color shapes. Subject: fictional athletic shoe campaign with runner bursting through graphic color shapes is the iconic product, object, or action hero associated with the campaign, fused with energetic photography and bold graphic design. Scene: urban track at sunrise, bold brand color system, magazine and outdoor print energy supplies the action environment, brand-color graphic zone, magazine/outdoor print energy, and product-forward campaign context. Composition: Fixed premium brand campaign composition: action photography drives the upper image, saturated brand color controls the lower graphic zone and borders, logo or wordmark space anchors the layout, typography stays high-contrast, and the campaign works as social post, magazine spread, and large-format outdoor print. Signature Elements: Action subject breaking through graphic shapes, saturated brand-color field, high-contrast logo zone, editorial campaign crop, strong product visibility, social/magazine/outdoor adaptability, and premium brand-ad polish. Style: Senior editorial art-direction brand poster with high-impact action photography, bold graphic design, autonomous brand-color logic, premium advertising energy, strong product visibility, large-format print polish, and social-ready campaign finish. Color Palette: Dominant saturated brand color for lower graphic zone and borders, high-contrast secondary typography color, product-derived accent colors, and clean campaign contrast that keeps the brand system legible. Lighting: Dynamic campaign lighting with crisp subject highlights, strong action separation, dramatic environmental light, product or apparel detail clarity, and bold graphic-zone contrast. Camera: Action-advertising camera with dynamic subject scale, motion-forward crop, strong perspective, sharp product or athlete detail, and enough clean space for logo and headline hierarchy. Typography: NOVA RUN / BUILT FOR MOTION appears as campaign headline, logo/wordmark text, and short tagline in the graphic zone; keep it bold, high-contrast, and readable at social and outdoor sizes. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-impact brand campaign poster featuring fictional outdoor jacket campaign with climber in motion and sweeping fabric lines. Subject: fictional outdoor jacket campaign with climber in motion and sweeping fabric lines is the iconic product, object, or action hero associated with the campaign, fused with energetic photography and bold graphic design. Scene: windy mountain ridge, high-contrast campaign typography and clean product visibility supplies the action environment, brand-color graphic zone, magazine/outdoor print energy, and product-forward campaign context. Composition: Fixed premium brand campaign composition: action photography drives the upper image, saturated brand color controls the lower graphic zone and borders, logo or wordmark space anchors the layout, typography stays high-contrast, and the campaign works as social post, magazine spread, and large-format outdoor print. Typography: LUMA GEAR / NEVER STAND STILL appears as campaign headline, logo/wordmark text, and short tagline in the graphic zone; keep it bold, high-contrast, and readable at social and outdoor sizes. Typography: RIDGE LINE / MOVE HIGHER appears as campaign headline, logo/wordmark text, and short tagline in the graphic zone; keep it bold, high-contrast, and readable at social and outdoor sizes.
